name: Mpumalanga (South Africa)

colors.symbolism: the rivers and the sky over the highveld
peace and the central rising sun
the rising sun — the meaning of the province's name ("place of the rising sun")

description: A horizontally divided field charged with a stylised yellow rising sun — emblematic of the province's name.
history: Mpumalanga (Nguni for "place where the sun rises") is one of the nine provinces of South Africa, created in 1994 from parts of the former Transvaal. Its provincial flag has been used by the provincial administration but has never been formally registered with the South African Bureau of Heraldry.

features.symbolism: horizontal divisions with a central rising sun emblematic of the province's name
the rising sun — the meaning of "Mpumalanga"
